steps.title: Isolate x
steps.content: Start with $$b-72=\frac{x}{y}.$$ Multiply both sides by $y$: $$y(b-72)=x.$$

steps.title: Check the structure of the answer
steps.content: The whole quantity $b-72$ is multiplied by $y$, so both terms must receive the factor $y$. That is why the answer has $by-72y$, not $by-72$.
